selection: 按 7–10 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 工程, 工厂, 工事, 活动部件, 机件, 著作, 作品, 善行, 德行；[机] 工厂, 工场
words.definition: n. performance of moral or religious acts

words.translation: a. 电子的
words.definition: a. of or relating to electronics; concerned with or using devices that operate on principles governing the behavior of electrons

words.translation: n. 基础, 根据, 建立
words.definition: n. the basis on which something is grounded

words.translation: n. 条件, 条款, 费用, 价钱, 关系, 地位, 交谊
n. 执照, 许可证, 特许；vt. 许可, 特许
words.definition: n. a legal document giving official permission to do something

words.translation: n. 版权, 著作权
words.definition: n. a document granting exclusive right to publish and sell literary or musical or artistic work

words.translation: n. 副本, 摹仿, 一册；v. 复印, 抄袭, 复制
words.definition: n. a thing made to be similar or identical to another thing

words.translation: a. 文学的, 文艺的, 精通文学的
words.definition: a. of or relating to or characteristic of literature

words.translation: vt. 把...存档；n. 档案馆, 档案文件
words.definition: v. put into an archive

words.translation: n. 美国
n. 领域, 领土, 产业, 范围
words.definition: n. territory over which rule or control is exercised

words.translation: n. 通路, 入口, 接近, 进入, 使用权, 发作；vt. 访问, 存取, 接近, 使用
words.definition: n. the right to obtain or make use of or take advantage of something (as services or membership)

words.translation: a. 联合的, 团结的, 一致的, 和睦的
words.definition: a. characterized by unity; being or joined into a single entity

words.translation: n. 段落, 短评；vt. 将...分段, 分段落
words.definition: n. one of several distinct subdivisions of a text intended to separate ideas; the beginning is usually marked by a new indented line

words.translation: n. 费用, 小费, 封地, 所有权；vt. 付费给
words.definition: n. a fixed charge for a privilege or for professional services

words.translation: a. 联合的
n. 商标
words.definition: n. a formally registered symbol identifying the manufacturer or distributor of a product

words.translation: n. 许可, 允许
words.definition: n. approval to do something

words.translation: adv. 往前, 以后, 向外
words.definition: r. forward in time or order or degree

words.translation: n. 拥有者, 物主, 所有人
words.definition: n. (law) someone who owns (is legal possessor of) a business

words.translation: n. 分配
words.definition: n. (statistics) an arrangement of values of a variable showing their observed or theoretical frequency of occurrence

words.translation: n. 状态, 情形, 地位, 要人身份
words.definition: n. the relative position or standing of things or especially persons in a society

words.translation: conj. 除非；prep. 除...之外
words.definition: conj. Upon any less condition than (the fact or thing stated

words.translation: vt. 分配, 散布, 分发
words.definition: v. administer or bestow, as in small portions

words.translation: n. 外面, 外表, 外界；a. 外面的, 外表的, 外界的
words.definition: n. the region that is outside of something

words.translation: a. 有限制的, 有限的, 有限责任的；n. 特别快车
words.definition: a. small in range or scope

words.translation: n. 媒体, 方法, 媒介；a. 半生熟的, 中间的
words.definition: n. a means or instrumentality for storing or communicating information

words.translation: n. 收集, 采集, (一批)收藏品, 募捐
words.definition: n. several things grouped together or considered as a whole

words.translation: n. 联系, 交际, 熟人, 接触；vi. 接触, 联系

words.translation: n. 档案, 公文箱, 文件夹, 文件, 卷宗, 锉刀；vi. 列队行进, 用锉刀做
words.definition: n. a set of related records (either written or electronic) kept together

words.translation: n. 网, 蛛丝, 蹼, 织物, 圈套, 卷筒纸；vi. 结网, 形成网

words.translation: vt. 除, 除外；vi. 反对

words.translation: adv. 自由地, 随意地, 无拘束地, 直率地, 坦白地, 慷慨地, 免费地, 大量地

words.translation: n. 惯用语, 词组, 成语, 措词, 乐句；vt. 用短语表达, 把(乐曲)分成短句

words.translation: vi. 顺从, 依从

words.translation: a. 受雇的, 付清的；pay的过去式和过去分词

words.translation: n. 平原, 草原, 朴实无华的东西, 无格式；a. 简单的, 明白的, 平常的, 不好看的, 朴素的, 清晰的, 普通的, 平坦的, 十足的

words.translation: a. 商业的, 商用的, 商品化的；n. 商业广告节目
words.definition: a. connected with or engaged in or sponsored by or used in commerce or commercial enterprises

words.translation: n. 装备, 设备, 才能

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词

words.translation: n. 书写, 著作, 笔迹, 作品

words.translation: a. 活跃的, 起作用的, 积极的, 有效的, 主动的, 活性的, 现行的, 现役的；n. 主动语态, 积极分子

words.translation: n. 检查, 支票, 阻止物, 寄物牌, 象棋中将军；vt. 检查, 阻止, 核对, 寄存, 托运

words.translation: n. 十月

words.translation: n. 句子, 命题, 宣判；vt. 宣判, 判决

words.translation: conj. 倘若, 以...为条件
words.definition: v give something useful or necessary to

words.translation: n. 军队, 陆军

words.translation: a. 直接的, 坦白的；vt. 指示, 指挥, 命令, 导演

words.translation: n. 任务, 代表团, 使命, 传教团；vt. 派遣, 向...传教

words.translation: n. 阅读, 知识, 读物；a. 阅读的

words.translation: n. 使用者
words.definition: n. a person who makes use of a thing; someone who uses or employs something

words.translation: a. 书面的, 写成文字的；write的过去分词

words.translation: adv. 无论何处
words.definition: r. at or in or to any place; (`anyplace' is used informally for `anywhere')

words.translation: v. 立基于, 以…为基础（base的过去式和过去分词）

words.translation: a. 相当的, 可观的, 重要的
words.definition: a. large or relatively large in number or amount or extent or degree

aux. 无法, 不能
words.definition: Am, is, or are, not able; -- written either as one word or
